单表查询.question: 查询所有用户的姓名和邮箱
单表查询.expected_answer: SELECT name, email FROM users
单表查询.model_response: SELECT name, email FROM users

单表查询.question: 统计用户总数
单表查询.expected_answer: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users
单表查询.model_response: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users

单表查询.question: 查找年龄大于25岁的用户
单表查询.expected_answer: SELECT * FROM users WHERE age > 25
单表查询.model_response: SELECT * FROM users WHERE age > 25

单表查询.question: 按注册时间降序排列
单表查询.expected_answer: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC
单表查询.model_response: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC

单表查询.question: 统计每个城市的用户数量
单表查询.expected_answer: SELECT city, COUNT(*) FROM users GROUP BY city
单表查询.model_response: SELECT city, COUNT(*) FROM users GROUP BY city

单表查询.question: 查找名为张三的用户
单表查询.expected_answer: SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = 'Zhang San'
单表查询.model_response: SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = 'Zhang San'

单表查询.question: 查询最近7天注册的用户
单表查询.expected_answer: SELECT * FROM users WHERE created_at >= DATE('now', '-7 days')
单表查询.model_response: SELECT * FROM users WHERE created_at >= date('now', '-7 days')

单表查询.question: 更新用户邮箱
单表查询.expected_answer: UPDATE users SET email = 'new@email.com' WHERE id = 1
单表查询.model_response: UPDATE users SET email = 'new@email.com' WHERE id = 1

单表查询.question: 删除已注销的用户
单表查询.expected_answer: DELETE FROM users WHERE status = 0
单表查询.model_response: DELETE FROM users WHERE status = 0

单表查询.question: 查询VIP用户的订单
单表查询.expected_answer: SELECT u.name, o.* FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.vip = 1
单表查询.model_response: SELECT u.name, o.* FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.vip = 1

单表查询.question: 查找没有订单的用户
单表查询.expected_answer: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM orders)
单表查询.model_response: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM orders)

单表查询.question: 计算用户平均年龄
单表查询.expected_answer: SELECT AVG(age) FROM users
单表查询.model_response: SELECT AVG(age) FROM users

多表查询.question: 查询用户及其订单信息
多表查询.expected_answer: SELECT u.name, o.product FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
多表查询.model_response: SELECT u.name, o.product FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id

多表查询.question: 查询每个用户的订单总数
多表查询.expected_answer: SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id
多表查询.model_response: SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id GROUP BY u.id

多表查询.question: 查找购买了特定商品的用户
多表查询.expected_answer: SELECT DISTINCT u.* FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.product = 'iPhone'
多表查询.model_response: SELECT DISTINCT u.* FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.product = 'iPhone'

多表查询.question: 多表联结统计销售额
多表查询.expected_answer: SELECT p.name, SUM(o.amount) FROM products p JOIN orders o ON p.id = o.product_id GROUP BY p.id
多表查询.model_response: SELECT p.name, SUM(o.amount) FROM products p JOIN orders o ON p.id = o.product_id GROUP BY p.id

多表查询.question: 查找用户最近订单
多表查询.expected_answer: SELECT u.name, o.* FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.created_at = (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM orders WHERE user_id = u.id)
多表查询.model_response: SELECT u.name, o.* FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT 1

多表查询.question: 查询库存不足的商品
多表查询.expected_answer: SELECT p.name, i.quantity FROM products p JOIN inventory i ON p.id = i.product_id WHERE i.quantity < 10
多表查询.model_response: SELECT p.name, i.quantity FROM products p JOIN inventory i ON p.id = i.product_id WHERE i.quantity < 10

多表查询.question: 多表更新订单状态
多表查询.expected_answer: UPDATE orders SET status = 1 WHERE id IN (SELECT o.id FROM orders o JOIN payments p ON o.id = p.order_id WHERE p.paid = 1)
多表查询.model_response: UPDATE orders SET status = 1 WHERE id IN (SELECT o.id FROM orders o JOIN payments p ON o.id = p.order_id WHERE p.paid = 1)

多表查询.question: 查询用户购物车和愿望清单
多表查询.expected_answer: SELECT u.name, c.product, w.product FROM users u LEFT JOIN cart c ON u.id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN wishlist w ON u.id = w.user_id
多表查询.model_response: SELECT u.name, c.product FROM users u LEFT JOIN cart c ON u.id = c.user_id

复杂查询.question: 递归查询组织架构
复杂查询.expected_answer: WITH RECURSIVE org AS (SELECT * FROM employees WHERE manager_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT e.* FROM employees e JOIN org o ON e.manager_id = o.id) SELECT * FROM org
复杂查询.model_response: WITH RECURSIVE org AS (SELECT * FROM employees WHERE manager_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT e.* FROM employees e JOIN org o ON e.manager_id = o.id) SELECT * FROM org

复杂查询.question: 窗口函数计算排名
复杂查询.expected_answer: SELECT name, score, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY score DESC) FROM students
复杂查询.model_response: SELECT name, score, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY score DESC) FROM students

复杂查询.question: 复杂子查询过滤
复杂查询.expected_answer: SELECT * FROM products WHERE id IN (SELECT product_id FROM orders GROUP BY product_id HAVING AVG(rating) > 4.0) AND price < 500
复杂查询.model_response: SELECT * FROM products WHERE price < 500 AND id IN (SELECT product_id FROM orders GROUP BY product_id HAVING AVG(rating) > 4.0)

复杂查询.question: 多条件聚合查询
复杂查询.expected_answer: SELECT region, category, SUM(sales) FROM orders WHERE date >= '2024-01-01' GROUP BY region, category HAVING SUM(sales) > 10000
复杂查询.model_response: SELECT region, category, SUM(sales) FROM orders WHERE date >= '2024-01-01' GROUP BY region, category HAVING SUM(sales) > 10000

复杂查询.question: CTE多步查询
复杂查询.expected_answer: WITH top_users AS (SELECT user_id, SUM(amount) as total FROM orders GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT u.* FROM users u JOIN top_users t ON u.id = t.user_id
复杂查询.model_response: WITH top_users AS (SELECT user_id, SUM(amount) as total FROM orders GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10) SELECT u.* FROM users u JOIN top_users t ON u.id = t.user_id

复杂查询.question: 时间序列聚合
复杂查询.expected_answer: SELECT DATE(created_at), COUNT(*), SUM(amount) FROM orders WHERE created_at >= DATE('now', '-30 days') GROUP BY DATE(created_at)
复杂查询.model_response: SELECT DATE(created_at) as d, COUNT(*), SUM(amount) FROM orders WHERE created_at >= date('now', '-30 days') GROUP BY d

复杂查询.question: 跨库查询
复杂查询.expected_answer: SELECT * FROM db1.users u JOIN db2.orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 1
复杂查询.model_response: SELECT * FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status = 1

复杂查询.question: PIVOT行转列
复杂查询.expected_answer: SELECT name, SUM(CASE WHEN month='Jan' THEN sales END) as Jan, SUM(CASE WHEN month='Feb' THEN sales END) as Feb FROM sales GROUP BY name
复杂查询.model_response: SELECT name, SUM(CASE WHEN month='Jan' THEN sales END) as Jan, SUM(CASE WHEN month='Feb' THEN sales END) as Feb FROM sales GROUP BY name
